## Interest Type

Please choose one:

- [ ] Investment
- [ ] Product partnership
- [ ] Pilot customer
- [ ] Technical collaboration
- [ ] Dive shop / creator workflow
- [ ] Other

## Background

Who are you or what organization do you represent?

## Use Case

What underwater color grading, media workflow, or AI video problem are you hoping this project can solve?

## Needed Capability

Which capabilities matter most?

- [ ] Fast underwater auto color correction
- [ ] Batch video processing
- [ ] AI person / water / coral / fish masking
- [ ] DaVinci Resolve handoff
- [ ] LUT / DCTL output
- [ ] Cloud processing
- [ ] Local/offline processing
- [ ] Commercial deployment

## Timeline

When would you want to test or discuss this?

## Public-Safe Notes

Please do not post passwords, API keys, private videos, financial documents, or confidential information in this public issue.
